questionHtml:
The graph shows human body temperature variation in a daily rhythm of 24 hours.

 

Which hormone controls this variation?

A. Progesterone

B.  Insulin

C.  Glucagon

D.  Thyroxin

meta.title: The graph shows human body temperature variation in a daily rhythm of 24 hours. Which hormone controls this variation? A. Progesterone B. Insulin C. Glucagon D. Thyroxin
breadcrumbLabels: D3.3.5. Thermoregulation as an example of negative feedback control
